case_title: GREGORY LOWE et al VS. SOL KUTNER ASSOCIATES, INC

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2002 SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARD. GREGORY LOWE, IN PRO PER, REPRESENTING APPELLANT; SOL KUTNER, PRO PER, REPRESENTING RESPONDENT. PARTIES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED AND ORAL ARGUMENT PRESENTED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOHN H. BICKEL; CLERK: ANNA REDIGONDA. DOCUMENTS ORDERED RETURNED BY MAIL. JUDGMENT FOR RESPONDENT AND AGAINST APPELLANT.
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT LOWE, GREGORY LOWE, LISA AS TO RESPONDENT SOL KUTNER ASSOCIATES, INC HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LOWE, GREGORY LOWE, LISA $4,306.08 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,356.08, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
APPEAL RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.
